title: anisopappus abercornensis subsp. anemonifolius
intro: Anisopappus abercornensis subsp. anemonifolius, also known as Anisopappus anemonifolius, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Anisopappus abercornensis subsp. anemonifolius is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its essential oil can be extracted for use in aromatherapy.
